title: Add CI tests for cache related noop flags

comments.body: 😞  the merge conflict commit won't be signed with DCO and CI will fail.

Not expecting this to pass CI until #659 is merged as not all the noop flags exist. If there are issues merging/squashing to get rid of the mess I have made in this PR adding DCO, I will just make another PR after #659 is merged. 🤕
@TomSweeneyRedHat / @rhatdan , can I get a retest on this? and if it's possible can it be squashed on merge to clean up the commit history? If not I can re-submit it as a single commit.
@pixdrift fingers crossed on the bot, it often times ignores me.
I will open a new PR.
